title: erysimum × kewense
intro: Erysimum × kewense, also known as wallflower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, derived from the cross between Erysimum cheiri and Erysimum crepidifolium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Erysimum × kewense include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
